notFound.title: Component not found

diff.title: Comparing
diff.invalidLead: This page needs a `from` and a `to` version in the URL. Head back to the component and use the version comparison selector to choose two releases.

diff.noMetadataChanges: No metadata changes between these versions.

configuration.emptyLead: The registry does not yet expose a configuration schema for this component. In the meantime, check the source repository for the canonical YAML keys.
